name: Baby Merge: Puzzle Master
description: Baby Merge is an irresistibly cute drop-and-merge puzzle game! Drop adorable baby animals into the pen — when two identical animals touch, they merge into a bigger, cuter creature! Evolve from tiny chicks all the way to magical unicorns and the legendary Baby Dragon. Features 11 animal tiers, chain combos, daily challenges, and a revive system. Simple to learn, impossible to put down! Easy, Medium & Hard modes with high score saving.
instructions: Move left and right to aim then drop baby animals into the pen Match two identical animals to merge them into a bigger cuter one
